label: Chief Executive John Lee announces first local five-year plan for Hong Kong
label_zh: 行政長官李家超宣布香港首個五年發展計劃

timeline.title: Chief Executive John Lee Directs Transition to Formulation Teams for Hong Kong’s First Five-Year Plan
timeline.title_zh: 行政長官李家超指示組建專責團隊，制定香港首份五年規劃
timeline.sub_title: Following the National People’s Congress approval of China’s 15th Five-Year Plan, John Lee instructs government bureaus to finalize a strategic local blueprint to ensure long-term socio-economic stability.
timeline.sub_title_zh: 在全國人大批准中國第十五個五年規劃後，李家超指示政府各部門完成本港的戰略藍圖，確保長期的社會經濟穩定。
timeline.summary:
Hong Kong Chief Executive John Lee Ka-chiu today marked a significant milestone in the city’s governance by directing all government bureaus to transition their preparatory groups into formal formulation teams. This move follows the conclusion of the fourth session of the 14th National People’s Congress in Beijing, where the central government officially approved the Outline of the 15th Five-Year Plan for National Economic and Social Development. The local [ref:9] blueprint, which will be the first of its kind for the Special Administrative Region, is designed to align seamlessly with the national strategy for the 2026–2030 period, ensuring that Hong Kong’s development is deeply integrated into the country’s broader economic trajectory.

Mr. Lee emphasized that this inaugural five-year plan is not merely a policy document but a shared action plan that will provide clear guidance for the city’s socio-economic and livelihood development. By moving beyond the [ref:6, 7] traditional framework of annual policy addresses, the HKSAR government aims to establish a more systematic and forward-looking policy environment. The Chief Executive [ref:10, 8] noted that the plan would have a profound impact, offering a roadmap that outlines the vision, core objectives, and major initiatives necessary to maintain Hong Kong’s competitive edge on the global stage. The fourth session also adopted the National Development Planning Law, further grounding these efforts in a robust legal framework that supports long-term national and regional coordination.

A central pillar of the upcoming blueprint is the consolidation of Hong Kong’s status as a global hub for finance, innovation, and trade. The 15th Five-Year Plan at the national level highlights several key roles for the city, including building a commodity trading ecosystem, a high-quality supply chain service center, and an international hub for high-end talent. To achieve these targets, [ref:9] the HKSAR government is prioritizing the development of the Northern Metropolis, which is expected to serve as a primary engine for high-value-added industries and technological advancement. By leveraging the industrial ecosystem of the Chinese mainland, particularly in areas like artificial intelligence and big data, Hong Kong aims to accelerate its transition into an international innovation and technology center while enhancing its status as an offshore Renminbi business hub.

Furthermore, the plan will focus on enhancing cross-border connectivity within the Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macao Greater Bay Area and consolidating Hong Kong's position as an international shipping and aviation center. Financial Secretary Paul Chan Mo-po previously underscored this intent in his budget speech, advocating for a Finance+ strategy that harnesses the city's financial prowess to bolster the real economy. This includes providing fundraising support for technology sectors and exploring emerging markets to deepen international collaboration. The transition from preparatory groups to formulation teams signifies a full speed effort to finalize the draft by the end of 2026, ensuring that the city is ready to execute its new missions as the national plan enters its first year of implementation.

Local lawmakers and deputies to the National People’s Congress have expressed strong support for the initiative, noting that the HKSAR government should not work behind closed doors but instead engage with all sectors to showcase and promote the national plan's benefits. They emphasized that the local five-year plan will allow Hong Kong to serve national needs while creating greater opportunities for its own growth. By establishing a concrete foundation [ref:5, 2, 3, 10, 4, 1] for long-term prosperity, the plan seeks to address local livelihood issues and improve the quality of life for residents. As the formulation teams begin their work, the government has pledged to maintain transparency and actively involve various sectors of society to ensure that the final blueprint reflects the collective wisdom and aspirations of the Hong Kong community.
timeline.summary_zh:
香港行政長官李家超今日標誌著本港管治的一個重要里程碑，他指示所有政府部門將其籌備小組轉為正式的制訂團隊。此舉是在北京第十四屆全國人民代表大會第四次會議閉幕後進行的，會議上中央政府正式批准了《國民經濟和社會發展第十五個五年規劃綱要》。這份本地藍圖將是特別行政區的首份五年規劃，旨在與 2026-2030 年期的國家戰略無縫對接，確保香港的發展深度融入國家更廣泛的經濟軌跡。[ref:9]

李先生強調，這份首份五年規劃不僅是一份政策文件，更是一份共同的行動計劃，將為本港的社會經濟和民生發展提供清晰的指引。透過超越傳統的施政報告框架，香港特別行政區政府旨在建立一個更系統化、更具前瞻性的政策環境。行政長官指出，該規劃將產生深遠影響，提供一份概述願景、核心目標和維持香港全球競爭力所需主要措施的路線圖。會議還通過了《國家發展規劃法》，為這些長期國家和區域協調工作奠定了堅實的法律基礎。[ref:6, 7, 10, 8]

即將推出的藍圖的一個核心支柱是鞏固香港作為全球金融、創新和貿易中心的地位。國家層面的第十五個五年規劃強調了該市的多個關鍵角色，包括建設商品貿易生態系統、優質供應鏈服務中心以及高端人才國際樞紐。為實現這些目標，特區政府正優先發展北部都會區，預計將成為高增值產業和技術進步的主要引擎。透過利用中國內地的產業生態系統，尤其是在人工智能和大數據等領域，香港旨在加速轉型為國際創新科技中心，同時提升其離岸人民幣業務中心的地位。[ref:9]

此外，該規劃將重點加強粵港澳大灣區內的跨境連接，並鞏固香港作為國際航運和航空中心的地位。財政司司長陳茂波先前在其預算案演講中已強調了這一意圖，倡導「金融+」策略，利用本港的金融實力來支持實體經濟。這包括為科技行業提供集資支持，並探索新興市場以深化國際合作。從籌備小組轉為制訂團隊，標誌著以全力推進，務求在 2026 年底前完成草案，確保在國家規劃進入實施第一年之際，本港已準備好執行其新任務。

本地議員和全國人大代表對此倡議表示強烈支持，他們指出，特區政府不應閉門造車，而應與所有界別互動，展示和推廣國家規劃的好處。他們強調，本地五年規劃將使香港能夠服務國家需求，同時為自身發展創造更多機會。透過為長期繁榮建立堅實基礎，該規劃旨在解決本地民生問題，提高居民的生活質素。隨著制訂團隊開始工作，政府承諾保持透明度，並積極吸納社會各界的參與，以確保最終藍圖能反映香港社會的集體智慧和願望。[ref:5, 2, 3, 10, 4, 1]

timeline.title: John Lee Announces Hong Kong’s First Local Five-Year Plan to Drive Regional Integration and Innovation
timeline.title_zh: 李家超宣布香港首個五年規劃，推動區域融合與創新
timeline.sub_title: Chief Executive John Lee reveals a historic five-year development blueprint for Hong Kong, prioritizing economic transformation, Northern Metropolis expansion, and strategic alignment with China’s national 15th Five-Year Plan.
timeline.sub_title_zh: 行政長官李家超揭示香港首個歷史性五年發展藍圖，重點關注經濟轉型、北部都會區擴展，以及與中國第15個五年規劃的戰略對接。
timeline.summary:
Hong Kong Chief Executive John Lee Ka-chiu has officially launched a historic initiative to draft the city's first-ever local five-year development plan. Announced immediately following the conclusion of the fourth session of the 14th National People's Congress in Beijing, this macroscopic blueprint is designed to align Hong Kong's socio-economic trajectory with China’s national 15th Five-Year Plan, which spans from 2026 to 2030. This move represents a paradigm shift from the city's traditional "laissez-faire" governance model, signaling a decisive move toward a more proactive, "executive-led" approach to policy planning and economic management that mirrors the strategic planning processes seen on the mainland.

The Chief Executive emphasized that this inaugural plan will serve as a comprehensive "shared action plan" for the Special Administrative Region (SAR). It is expected to provide clear guidance on development visions, core objectives, and major initiatives across all sectors of society. By integrating [ref:9] more deeply into the national development framework, Hong Kong aims to consolidate its long-standing status as an international financial, shipping, and trade hub while simultaneously transforming into a global powerhouse for innovation and technology. Lee characterized [ref:9, 7] the plan as having a "profound impact" on the city's future, ensuring that the SAR can navigate an increasingly complex geopolitical landscape and global economic volatility with greater strategic clarity and resilience.

To facilitate the drafting process, Lee has directed all 15 government policy bureaus to establish specialized formulation teams. These teams, which have recently transitioned from earlier preparatory groups, are now tasked with working at full speed to complete the blueprint within the 2026 calendar year. The drafting process [ref:8, 5] will be spearheaded by the Constitutional and Mainland Affairs Bureau, with the Chief Executive personally overseeing the progress to ensure cross-departmental cohesion. This hands-on leadership reflects the administration's commitment to assuming the primary responsibility for governance and long-term prosperity under the "one country, two systems" framework.

A central pillar of the upcoming five-year plan is the accelerated development of the Northern Metropolis. This massive urban project is slated to become a new engine for economic growth, fostering deeper synergy with the Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macao Greater Bay Area and attracting high-value-added industries. Furthermore, the government [ref:3] intends to leverage the national "AI+" action plan to empower traditional industries and foster emerging sectors such as artificial intelligence, biotechnology, and high-end manufacturing. The plan also prioritizes the establishment of a robust commodity trading ecosystem and a high-value-added supply-chain service center to further diversify the city's economic base.

Beyond economic metrics, the five-year plan will address critical social issues, including livelihood improvements and creating more opportunities for youth upward mobility. By providing a stable and forward-looking roadmap, the administration seeks to attract and retain high-caliber global talent to bolster the city's competitiveness. Financial Secretary Paul Chan reinforced this vision, noting that a structured five-year framework will optimize the business environment and provide a clear roadmap for investors and market participants alike. Ultimately, this inaugural plan seeks to marry Hong Kong’s unique institutional advantages with national strategic priorities, securing a prosperous and integrated future for the city.
timeline.summary_zh:
香港行政長官李家超在第14屆全國人民代表大會第四次會議結束後，於北京正式啟動了編制本港首個本地五年發展計劃的歷史性倡議。這份宏觀藍圖旨在使香港的社會經濟軌跡與中國2026年至2030年的國家第15個五年規劃相協調。這一舉動標誌著該市傳統「自由放任」治理模式的轉變，表明正採取一種更積極主動、由「行政主導」的政策規劃和經濟管理方式，這與內地的戰略規劃過程相似。

行政長官強調，這份首個五年規劃將作為特別行政區（SAR）的全面「共享行動計劃」。預計它將為社會各界發展願景、核心目標和主要舉措提供清晰指引。通過更深入地融入國家發展框架，香港旨在鞏固其長期以來作為國際金融、航運和貿易中心的地位，同時轉型為全球創新和科技強國。李家超形容該計劃將對本港的未來產生「深遠影響」，確保特別行政區能在日益複雜的地緣政治格局和全球經濟動盪中，以更大的戰略清晰度和韌性前行。[ref:9, 7]

為便利規劃編制工作，李家超已指示所有15個政府政策局成立專門的編制團隊。這些團隊最近從早期的籌備小組轉型而來，現正全力以赴，爭取在2026年曆法年內完成藍圖。編制工作將由憲法及內地事務局牽頭，行政長官將親自監督進度，以確保跨部門協調。這種親力親為的領導反映了政府在「一國兩制」框架下，承擔管治和長期繁榮主要責任的承諾。[ref:8, 5]

即將到來的五年規劃的核心支柱是加速發展北部都會區。這個龐大的城市項目將成為經濟增長的新引擎，促進與粵港澳大灣區的更深層協同效應，並吸引高增值產業。此外，政府計劃利用國家「AI+」行動計劃賦能傳統產業，並培育人工智能、生物科技和高端製造業等新興產業。該規劃還優先建立健全的商品交易生態系統和高增值供應鏈服務中心，以進一步多元化本港經濟基礎。[ref:3]

除了經濟指標外，五年規劃也將解決關鍵的社會問題，包括改善民生和為年輕人提供更多向上流動的機會。通過提供一個穩定且具前瞻性的路線圖，政府尋求吸引和留住高素質的全球人才，以增強本港的競爭力。財政司司長陳茂波強調了這一願景，指出一個結構化的五年框架將優化營商環境，並為投資者和市場參與者提供清晰的路線圖。最終，這份首個五年規劃旨在結合香港獨特的制度優勢與國家戰略重點，確保本港擁有繁榮和整合的未來。[ref:null]
